agenda: Monthly check-in for Bluff City Medical Center pastoral care team. Staff chaplains + CPE residents. Caseload reflections, supervision notes, and upcoming coverage schedule.
Wednesday radio prep call with TJ Jackson. Guest lineup for January, sponsor reads for Covenant Insurance Group and Mitchell's Flowers, theme arc for winter series.
Individual and group supervision session for the two CPE residents. Verbatim review, theological reflection, and learning goals for remainder of residency.

topic: Interfaith Chaplains Peer Network - Q1 Gathering
agenda: Peer support and case consultation with Rev. Angela Dawson and regional chaplains. Topic: Compassion fatigue resources and self-care protocols in acute care settings.

topic: Grace Community Church - Community Health Fair Planning
agenda: Planning session with Deacon Charles Mosley for the annual community church health fair. Vendor contacts, health screenings, volunteer schedule, and Rebecca's opening meditation.

topic: Morning Reflections - Guest Interview: Sandra Coles
agenda: Pre-show interview prep with Sandra Coles (Bluff City Community College nursing professor). Topic segment on community health literacy. Record audio for on-air segment.

topic: CPE Continuing Education - Narrative Chaplaincy Webinar
agenda: APC-approved webinar: Narrative Approaches in Spiritual Care. Counts 2 hrs toward 2026 CPE continuing-education requirement (28 of 50 hrs completed to date).
Monthly supervision check-in with Dr. Lorraine Vickers. Staff scheduling for February on-call rotation and CPE resident mid-term evaluations.

topic: WGSP Sponsor Review - Q1 Covenant Insurance Group
agenda: Quarterly sponsor alignment call with Covenant Insurance Group representative. Review Q1 ad reads, listener engagement stats, and upcoming community segments.
Monthly team check-in. Coverage rotation review, CPE resident progress updates, department-wide protocol reminders from Dr. Vickers.
Wednesday radio prep with TJ Jackson. January guest schedule, MLK Day 'Let Freedom Ring' special episode planning, Bluff City Auto Care read update.

topic: CPE Resident Supervision - Winter Cohort Final
agenda: Final supervision session for winter CPE cohort. End-of-residency reflection, competency review, and transition planning.

topic: Interfaith Chaplains Peer Network - Q1 Gathering
agenda: Peer consultation with Rev. Angela Dawson and regional colleagues. Topic: Spiritual care in end-of-life settings - integrating chaplaincy and palliative care teams.
Planning call with TJ Jackson for WGSP 7th anniversary episode (show launched 2019). Special guests, listener call-in segment, sponsor acknowledgments.

topic: Grace Community Church - New Year Dawn Service Prep
agenda: Coordination call with Pastor William Greer and Deacon Charles Mosley. Rebecca delivering the dawn meditation. Order of service, audio setup, volunteer briefing.
December team check-in. On-call schedule for January, palliative care coordination update, CPE resident mid-term reviews.
APC-approved webinar: Trauma-Informed Approaches in Hospital Chaplaincy. 2-hr credit toward annual 50-hr CPE continuing-education requirement.
